name: Meesmickle
key_features: Dark One's Blessing (gain 23 temp HP when reducing hostile creature to 0 HP)
Dark One's Own Luck (add d10 to ability check or saving throw, 1/short rest)
Fiendish Resilience (choose one damage type resistance on short/long rest)
Hurl Through Hell (attack hit transports target through lower planes, 10d10 psychic, 1/long rest)
One with Shadows (invisible in dim light/darkness until moving/acting)
Eldritch Master (regain all Pact Magic slots, 1/long rest)
party_role_guess: Striker / Blaster (Eldritch Blast, Fiend patron, temp HP sustain)
